featuredProjects.name: Finlytics Dashboard

featuredProjects.summary: A shared UI system with tokens, components, and documentation used across multiple product squads.

booksRead.title: The Pragmatic Programmer

booksRead.notes: Practical mindset shifts for writing maintainable and resilient software.

booksRead.title: Refactoring

booksRead.notes: Useful patterns for improving code structure without changing behavior.

booksRead.title: Clean Architecture

booksRead.notes: Clear guidance on boundaries, dependencies, and long-term maintainability.
